description: Execute V0.7-M5-C by defining the SubAgent review automation governance roadmap, specifically bounding how _review_pending states can trigger external review processes without violating the Gatekeeper paradigm.
scope: Generate a roadmap document (tasks/v0.7-m5-c-review-automation-roadmap.md) explicitly answering the boundaries, gating conditions, and verification methods for automated reviews. Must explicitly establish how to prevent 'rubber-stamp' automated scripts from bypassing isolated SubAgent invocation.
out_of_scope: Strictly NO implementation of the actual CI/CD or local automation scripts. NO modification to existing MCP tools. NO modifications to active workflow/dispatch.json or iteration-state.json state models.
stop_conditions: Attempting to write runnable automation scripts.
Attempting to modify any file outside allowed_files.
Executing without an approved M5-C contract.
